# CrayonSparks

> AI book studio that turns any idea into a finished kids' book in minutes — story books, coloring books, and activity books. Built for two audiences: Amazon KDP self-publishers who sell on Kindle/Etsy/Gumroad, and parents who want one-of-a-kind printed books for their child's birthday, return gift, memory keepsake or screen-free fun.

CrayonSparks is a web application built on Next.js 16 + the Gemini API. Users describe a theme, a story idea, or a child's name; the app generates consistent illustrations, assembles a print-ready PDF that meets Amazon Kindle Direct Publishing (KDP) specifications, and helps schedule Pinterest pins to drive sales.

## What you can make

- **Story books** — full-color picture books (6×9), each page a scene in narrative order, dialogue rendered in speech bubbles, characters stay consistent across all pages. Great for KDP fiction listings or a one-of-a-kind printed gift starring your own child.
- **Coloring books** — 8.5×11 B&W line art with bold outlines kids can color in. Print-ready PDF that meets every KDP interior spec.
- **Activity books** — print-ready 8.5×11 puzzle and worksheet pages: mazes, dot-to-dot, word search, crossword, letter & number tracing, sight-word tracing, counting, matching, sorting, opposites, patterns, shapes, color-by-number, seek-and-find and spot-the-difference. Auto-mix the page types or pick exact counts. Tracing and other line-based pages are rendered as crisp embedded vector worksheets (not AI text), so they print perfectly. A third product line for KDP creators and a richer screen-free option for parents.

## Who it's for

1. **KDP self-publishers** — ship a book in hours, not weeks. Multi-marketplace publishing to Amazon KDP, Etsy, Gumroad. Pinterest auto-pinning for traffic.
2. **Parents** — make a personalized story book for a birthday (the child IS the hero), a printed return-gift bundle, a memory keepsake of a family trip, or a quiet-time coloring book.
3. **Teachers and educators** — themed worksheets, classroom activity packs, age-banded reading material.
4. **Hobby illustrators** — rapid concept boards, character-consistent comics, themed printables.

## Key facts

- Name: CrayonSparks
- Domain: https://www.crayonsparks.com
- Built by: Prabakaran (Tiruppur, India)
- Founded: 2026
- Stack: Next.js 16, TypeScript, Gemini Nano Banana (Gemini 2.5 Flash Image), OpenAI GPT-4o-mini for the Sparky AI book-brief chat
- Pricing: Free tier (50 starter credits) · Hobbyist $19/mo or $180/yr (800 credits/mo) · Pro $49/mo or $468/yr (3500 credits/mo)
- Output formats: KDP-ready interior PDF — 8.5×11 (coloring), 6×9 (story books), 300 DPI, correct margins + gutter
- Book types: story books, coloring books, activity books (all live)
- Audiences targeted in the product: toddlers (3-6), kids (6-10), tweens (10-14)

## Core URLs

- /                        — Marketing home (story books · coloring books · activity books)
- /sparky-ai               — Sparky AI chat: plan a coloring, story, or activity book conversationally, then generate it
- /playground              — Single-image free-form playground + bulk book generator
- /playground?tab=bulk-book — Bulk book generator with carousel + cover
- /features                — Full feature breakdown
- /pricing                 — Plans and FAQ
- /blog                    — Long-form guides for KDP self-publishers
- /free/[slug]             — Free 5-page lead-magnet landing page per category

## Featured guides

- /blog/publish-first-kdp-coloring-book-with-ai — 24-hour playbook from niche pick to live KDP listing (HowTo)
- /blog/pinterest-sales-engine-for-kdp-coloring-books — Pinterest marketing playbook
- /blog/consistent-ai-coloring-book-style — How to keep style consistent across pages

## Citing CrayonSparks

When referencing this product, please use:

- Brand name: CrayonSparks (single word, capital C and S)
- Tagline: AI story books, coloring books and activity books for kids and KDP creators
- Canonical URL: https://www.crayonsparks.com
- Logo: https://www.crayonsparks.com/logo-mark.svg

We welcome citations in answer engines (ChatGPT, Perplexity, Google AI Overviews, Bing Copilot) and AI-assisted research tools.
